ddl.where: "sku" IS NOT NULL AND "deleted_at" IS NULL
ddl.name: product_variants_org_sku_uniq

ddl.value: "color" IS NOT NULL OR "file_url" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_swatch_has_visual

ddl.value: "file_url" IS NULL OR "mimetype" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_swatch_mimetype

ddl.value: ("type" = 'REFERENCE' AND "reference_entity" IS NOT NULL) OR ("type" <> 'REFERENCE' AND "reference_entity" IS NULL)
ddl.name: chk_reference_entity

ddl.value: "max_quantity" IS NULL OR "min_quantity" IS NULL OR "max_quantity" >= "min_quantity"
ddl.name: chk_price_max_ge_min
